requirement_topic.en: OCPP Back-Office Interoperability for Networked Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: 联网充电桩的OCPP后台互操作
requirement_topic.zht: 聯網充電樁的OCPP後台互操作

summary.en: OCPP is the Open Charge Alliance protocol used for communication between charging stations and central management systems. UAE charge-point operators, fleet operators, landlords, and DEWA-related deployments may require OCPP support for authentication, metering data, remote monitoring, tariffs, firmware updates, fault handling, and network migration. OCPP is not a universal UAE legal mandate by itself, but it becomes mandatory when required by the operator, tender, utility program, or back-office platform.
summary.zh: OCPP是Open Charge Alliance用于充电站与中央管理系统通信的协议。阿联酋充电运营商、车队运营商、业主及DEWA相关部署可能要求支持OCPP，以实现认证、计量数据、远程监控、资费、固件更新、故障处理和网络迁移。OCPP本身并非阿联酋通用法律强制要求；但当运营商、招标、公用事业项目或后台平台要求时，即成为强制项目要求。
summary.zht: OCPP是Open Charge Alliance用於充電站與中央管理系統通訊的協議。阿聯酋充電運營商、車隊運營商、業主及DEWA相關部署可能要求支持OCPP，以實現認證、計量數據、遠程監控、資費、韌體更新、故障處理和網絡遷移。OCPP本身並非阿聯酋通用法律強制要求；但當運營商、招標、公用事業項目或後台平台要求時，即成為強制項目要求。

standards_or_laws: Open Charge Alliance OCPP certification program
Operator or tender cybersecurity and backend integration specifications

summary.en: China DC charging systems commonly rely on GB/T 27930 for charger-to-vehicle communication and may use proprietary or domestic back-office protocols for station management. That is a different layer from OCPP, and GB/T 27930 support does not prove OCPP backend compatibility.
summary.zh: 中国直流充电系统通常采用GB/T 27930进行充电机与车辆通信，并可能使用专有或国内后台协议进行站点管理。该层级不同于OCPP，支持GB/T 27930并不能证明具备OCPP后台兼容性。
summary.zht: 中國直流充電系統通常採用GB/T 27930進行充電機與車輛通訊，並可能使用專有或國內後台協議進行站點管理。該層級不同於OCPP，支持GB/T 27930並不能證明具備OCPP後台相容性。

gap.en: Exporters should test the exact OCPP version and security profile requested by the UAE operator, including WebSocket/TLS setup, certificate handling, transaction messages, meter values, remote start/stop, firmware update, diagnostics, offline behavior, and interoperability with the nominated central system.
gap.zh: 出口商应测试阿联酋运营方指定的OCPP版本和安全配置，包括WebSocket/TLS设置、证书处理、交易报文、计量值、远程启停、固件更新、诊断、离线行为，以及与指定中央系统的互操作。
gap.zht: 出口商應測試阿聯酋運營方指定的OCPP版本和安全配置，包括WebSocket/TLS設置、證書處理、交易報文、計量值、遠程啟停、韌體更新、診斷、離線行為，以及與指定中央系統的互操作。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary as a standalone protocol; mandatory when required by DEWA-related program rules, charge-point operator, tender, fleet, landlord, or backend platform
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is a China charger-to-vehicle communication baseline and does not establish OCPP backend compliance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] OCPP should be treated as a UAE operator-integration requirement, not assumed from GB/T communication support. Verify version, security profile, certification expectation, and live backend interoperability before deployment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将OCPP视为阿联酋运营方集成要求，不能从GB/T通信支持推定。部署前应核验版本、安全配置、认证预期和实际后台互操作。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將OCPP視為阿聯酋運營方集成要求，不能從GB/T通訊支持推定。部署前應核驗版本、安全配置、認證預期和實際後台互操作。

requirement_topic.en: EMC, RCD, and Electrical Safety Evidence

summary.en: EVSE intended for UAE projects should provide IEC-family EMC and safety evidence. IEC 61851-21-2 addresses EMC requirements for off-board EV charging systems, while IEC 61851-1 addresses general safety functions including protection against electric shock and protective devices. RCD type, residual DC detection, earthing arrangement, surge protection, enclosure IP rating, thermal limits, and electromagnetic emissions should be validated against the intended UAE installation and utility requirements.
summary.zh: 拟用于阿联酋项目的EVSE应提供IEC体系EMC和安全证据。IEC 61851-21-2适用于非车载电动汽车充电系统的EMC要求，IEC 61851-1涵盖通用安全功能，包括防触电保护和保护器件。RCD类型、直流剩余电流检测、接地方式、浪涌保护、外壳IP等级、热限制和电磁发射，应结合目标阿联酋安装场景及公用事业要求进行验证。
summary.zht: 擬用於阿聯酋項目的EVSE應提供IEC體系EMC和安全證據。IEC 61851-21-2適用於非車載電動汽車充電系統的EMC要求，IEC 61851-1涵蓋通用安全功能，包括防觸電保護和保護器件。RCD類型、直流剩餘電流檢測、接地方式、浪湧保護、外殼IP等級、熱限制和電磁發射，應結合目標阿聯酋安裝場景及公用事業要求進行驗證。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-21-2:2018 — EMC requirements for off-board electric vehicle charging systems
IEC 61000 series EMC test methods where referenced by the test plan

summary.en: China EVSE documentation may include GB/T 18487 safety evidence and China EMC test reports. These can inform design review, but UAE projects commonly need reports mapped to IEC clauses, local supply conditions, earthing system, ambient temperature, and the selected Type 2 / CCS2 connector design.
summary.zh: 中国EVSE文件可能包括GB/T 18487安全证据和中国EMC测试报告。这些资料可用于设计审查，但阿联酋项目通常需要将报告映射至IEC条款、当地供电条件、接地系统、环境温度和所选Type 2 / CCS2接口设计。
summary.zht: 中國EVSE文件可能包括GB/T 18487安全證據和中國EMC測試報告。這些資料可用於設計審查，但阿聯酋項目通常需要將報告映射至IEC條款、當地供電條件、接地系統、環境溫度和所選Type 2 / CCS2接口設計。

gap.en: The main documentation gap is usually an accredited IEC EMC and safety package tied to the final UAE hardware configuration. Changing from GB/T to Type 2 / CCS2, adding a cellular router, changing cable length, or changing enclosure and cooling can invalidate earlier EMC, leakage-current, RCD, temperature-rise, or IP evidence.
gap.zh: 主要文件差距通常是与最终阿联酋硬件配置绑定的认可IEC EMC和安全资料包。从GB/T改为Type 2 / CCS2、增加蜂窝路由器、改变电缆长度，或改变外壳及冷却方案，都可能使此前的EMC、漏电流、RCD、温升或IP证据失效。
gap.zht: 主要文件差距通常是與最終阿聯酋硬體配置綁定的認可IEC EMC和安全資料包。從GB/T改為Type 2 / CCS2、增加蜂窩路由器、改變電纜長度，或改變外殼及冷卻方案，都可能使此前的EMC、漏電流、RCD、溫升或IP證據失效。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by UAE regulated-product scope, utility connection, electrical installation approval, tender, or site-owner specification; otherwise core due-diligence evidence for EVSE safety and EMC
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T safety and EMC evidence applies to China domestic routes and must be mapped before UAE acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UAE-facing EVSE files should include final-configuration IEC EMC, RCD, earthing, temperature-rise, IP, and electrical safety evidence. Reusing China GB/T reports without configuration and clause mapping is high risk.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向阿联酋的EVSE文件应包括最终配置下的IEC EMC、RCD、接地、温升、IP和电气安全证据。未进行配置及条款映射而直接复用中国GB/T报告，风险较高。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向阿聯酋的EVSE文件應包括最終配置下的IEC EMC、RCD、接地、溫升、IP和電氣安全證據。未進行配置及條款映射而直接復用中國GB/T報告，風險較高。
